---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that LidLess does not support today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like it to do? Include config or command shapes if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else that helps — links, screenshots, related issues.
